Contact

Swell Creative

Management 

We’ve reimagined creative services with a flexible project-based model, offering clients high-quality solutions without the need for an AOR partnership.

We are your

mothership

We build audiences. We’re storytellers at heart.
We pair great talent with powerful tools to achieve magical results for your brand.

We deliver bespoke creative solutions that elevate brands and drive growth. We bring a roster of award-winning creative talent customized for your project’s needs.

Our expertise spans creative direction, strategy, branding, campaigns, design, digital experiences, social media, and commercial production.

Meet The Leadership Team

  • David

    President

    David is the President and Executive Producer of Swell Network. With a 25 year award-winning history working in the entertainment industry David has successfully led many Film and Advertising projects for Iconic Clients here and around the world with many leading to International awards. Renow- ned for his unyielding commitment to team excellence David is responsible for the overall direction of the various divisions within the company. David loves to discover new and innovative ways in which creativity can add value to the ever-evolving space where culture meets commerce.

  • Debbie

    Lead Client Partner

    Dynamic and results-oriented Executive with extensive experience in strategic marketing, operational leadership, and business growth. Demonstrated expertise in leveraging advanced technologies and data insights to drive revenue, optimize performance, and foster innovation.

  • Taylor

    Executive Creative Director

    Creative Director and Senior Product Designer, Taylor has a rich history of crafting world-class experiences for renowned companies like Apple, Nike, AKQA, R/GA, Logitech, and RH. His expertise spans a wide range of design and development disciplines, and his passion for innovation is evident in every project he under- takes. He’s been part of seven different startups and is known  for is killer instincts for launching businesses and bringing   products to market.

  • Christa

    Head of Strategy

    Christa’s career is defined by transforming iconic consumer brands and fast-moving tech startups—like HBO, Paramount, SoulCycle, Compass and Clorox—into success stories. She blends the art of brand storytelling with the science of data-driven marketing, creating seamless customer journeys that fuel demand and maximize lifetime value.

  • Jasmine

    Program Director

    Jasmine’s had an extensive career in the Marketing and Advertising world, producing work for Fortune 500 brands which include Nike, Samsung, Chevy, Adidas, Google among others.  She had the fortune to be successful as a consultant  working with top creative agencies in New York and California producing award-winning global campaigns and editorial content.

What we do

Research / Brand Strategy / Experiential Marketing Experts / Brand Architecture / Naming/ Visual Identity / Verbal Identity / Digital Experience / Go-to-Market Strategy / Integrated Campaigns / Content Production / Packaging Design


Ready to tell your story? Browse available services, then book a free consultation. Let’s create together.

Sign up to receive email updates, availability, special promotions and more. I respect your privacy and will never share your information with any third-party vendors.
